property_address: Flat 123, Sample street, Sample city, AB1 CD3

rooms.name: Balcony
rooms.summary: The balcony appears modern and in clean decorative order overall, with composite decking, metal balustrading and painted external walls/soffits presented in a generally tidy state. No significant damage is visible in the photographs, and the space appears well maintained with only light, incidental outdoor use evident. The interior door and glazing visible to the balcony also appear in good condition.

items.description: Grey composite decking boards laid lengthways across the balcony floor.
defects: Light surface wear consistent with external use; no distinct damage visible

rooms.name: Bathroom
rooms.summary: A high-spec contemporary bathroom presented in very clean overall decorative order, with polished finishes and a coordinated monochrome/stone effect scheme. Surfaces appear generally well maintained and clean, with only light evidence of normal use visible in close-up. No significant damage is apparent in the supplied photographs.

rooms.name: Bedroom
rooms.summary: A modern bedroom presented in generally good decorative order and appears clean overall, with light domestic use evident to some walls, fittings and furnishings. The room is sparsely furnished and tidy, with neutral décor, carpeted flooring and a large window with a roller blind. There are a few visible marks to the walls, some wear/marks to electrical fittings, and a couple of observed blemishes to the mattress and bedside furniture.

rooms.name: Entrance Hall
rooms.summary: The entrance hall is finished in a contemporary style and appears generally clean, bright and well maintained. Decoration is predominantly neutral with white painted walls, white skirting/trim and wood-effect flooring, with integrated lighting and multiple wall control plates. Overall condition is good with only light scuffs and minor surface marks visible in places, and no significant damage noted in the supplied photographs.

rooms.name: Reception & Open Plan Kitchen
rooms.summary: A high-spec reception and open plan kitchen presented in generally very good decorative order and appears clean overall, with modern integrated fittings and a coordinated contemporary finish throughout. The room is largely well maintained, although several upholstered items show visible wear and marking, and there are minor marks to some cupboard fronts, walls and timber surrounds. Windows and glazing appear sound, and the kitchen appliances and cabinetry are present and in good working visual order from the images supplied.

rooms.name: Walk In Wardrobe
rooms.summary: The walk in wardrobe appears newly decorated and generally very clean, with white painted walls/ceiling and light grey carpet present to the floor. The fitted wardrobes and internal doors appear in good order overall, with only minor cosmetic marks noted to the painted surfaces and carpet. No significant damage is visible in the photos.
